name: controlbox
description: Autonomous Race Control System for Online Leagues

scripts.build:ci: npm run build --workspace=@controlbox/common --workspace=@okboxbox/contracts --workspace=@controlbox/protocol --workspace=@controlbox/server --workspace=@okboxbox/app --workspace=@okboxbox/website && npm run build:ci --workspace=okboxbox-desktop
scripts.legacy:website: node scripts/guard-legacy.js && cd legacy/ProjectBlackBox/blackbox-web && npm run dev
scripts.legacy:dashboard: node scripts/guard-legacy.js && cd legacy/ProjectBlackBox/dashboard && PORT=3005 REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3001 npm start
scripts.legacy:ops-console: node scripts/guard-legacy.js && cd legacy/ProjectBlackBox/dashboard && PORT=3005 REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3001 npm start
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules packages/*/dist tools/*/node_modules tools/*/dist

author: OKBoxBox
